student_desc: The target LLM endpoint whose prompt instructions will be optimized.
teacher_desc: The high-capacity LLM endpoint (e.g. GPT-4o) used to generate prompt proposals and grade output quality.
auto_mode_desc: DSPy MIPROv2 search mode depth ('light' for speed, 'medium' for balanced, 'heavy' for exhaustive search).
num_threads_desc: Number of parallel threads to use during metric evaluations (keep low for local models, high for cloud APIs).
train_ratio_desc: Split ratio of the dataset examples allocated for training, with the remainder used for evaluation.
requires_permission_to_run_desc: Ask for user confirmation of estimated API token costs before executing compilation loops.
optimizer_desc: Configure the compiler/predictor mode: 'chain-of-thought' (default) or 'predict' (recommended for iOS/schema-guided structured output).
num_trials_desc: Direct override for compilation trials count in MIPROv2. Set to an integer to bypass auto mode default.
minibatch_desc: Controls whether compilation runs on subsets of training examples (recommended for dataset sizes > 100).
num_candidates_desc: Explicit limit on the number of prompt instruction candidates proposed by the teacher.
